# Fractals Web

Fractals Web is the web version of the original fractals project by Aarti S Ravikumar.

## Purpose
A modular visual science workbench for students, educators, and researchers.

## Key Pages
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/fractals
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/discover
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/box-count
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/compare
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/tumor-detection
- https://fractals.ai-aaarti.com/workbench/runs

## Summary
Use this site to explore fractals, compare image evidence, document reproducible analysis, and share results.
